summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that BLK is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $1029.71. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 58.3%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $1096.12 and a significant trendline confluence around $1050.02 (formed by 9 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
